Looks like SG&A subcomponent label but no visible values in preview.

variables.notes: CR:c|low|missing. An explicit SG&A row exists but is blank in 2025 while populated in earlier years, so per rule selected that row plus the closest broad overhead bucket for coverage. Excluded depreciation/amortization and excluded the supplemental below-EBIT R&D row from XSGA.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line; suitable for XRD even though it appears in supplemental disclosure below EBIT.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D line exists. It appears below EBIT in the preview, so it is mapped to XRD but not also added to XSGA_COMPONENTS.

Not a finance cost.
